text:
Once upon a gentle breeze in a faraway forest, there was a tiny kitten named Paws who lived in a cozy nook among the ferns and moss. Paws was quite the little ball of energy, always curious about the world around her. One sunny morning, as she played under the old oak tree, she noticed a butterfly fluttering weakly near the base of the trunk.

Paws, with her kind heart, decided to investigate. She approached the butterfly cautiously, not wanting to scare it away. As she got closer, she saw that one of its wings was torn. With a soft touch, Paws helped the butterfly back to its feet. The butterfly flapped its wings, and to everyone's surprise, it flew straight up into the air, its wing mended by the magic of friendship.

From that day on, Paws and the butterfly became the best of friends. They would meet every morning to dance in the sunlight or share stories under the old oak. The
